work_unit: Re-audit: post-audit-2026-07-06-021 new commits (d6f650b, af5c873, f665031, 4f64c77, 5162ef6) + worktree backlog analysis
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete with no unaudited git projects remaining in workspace. All 9 git repos previously deep-audited. personal-assistant selected for re-audit due to highest post-audit activity (5 new commits in 12h since audit-2026-07-06-021). Additionally, 16 stale worktrees with 37 unmerged commits identified as operational risk.
action: Deep re-audit via sonnet sub-agent. Read 5 recent commits' changed files (web/api.js, web/index.html, android/index.html, personal_assistant/api.py, tests/test_ui_click_flow.py). Verified prior H-001..H-004 substantively addressed via independent reimplementation on main. Found 9 new findings (0 high, 4 medium, 4 low, 1 info). Produced audit report audit-2026-07-07-027.md. Updated audit-cycle-state.json with 4 derived_fixes (M-004 route-fix pending; M-001/M-002/M-003 structural pending). Status → fix-in-progress.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-07-027.md written (9 findings, 4 medium). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=4, current_audit_id=audit-2026-07-07-027. Prior H-001..H-004 confirmed substantively addressed on main via d6f650b/af5c873/f665031. 16 stale worktrees documented as conflict risk.
next_suggestion: 派生 M-004 route-fix: personal_assistant/api.py ReminderIn.what 加 max_length=1000 (1-file fix, opt-worktree 复用)
归档 personal-assistant 16 个 stale worktree（substantive fixes 已独立重实现到 main，merge 会冲突）
M-001/M-002/M-003 structural timeout 架构问题写入 structural-debt.md 待用户授权
下轮若所有 derived_fixes 处理完毕且仍无未审项目，继续 re-audit 次活跃项目（moni-master 或 shizi）

audit_findings.finding: clearTimeout(tid) placed after fetch resolve but before r.json() — body-read phase has no timeout protection
audit_findings.remediation: Move clearTimeout after r.json() completes or wrap r.json() in its own timeout race

audit_findings.finding: Bootstrap Promise.race 5s timeout does not cancel in-flight fetches — orphan requests mutate MockData after render
audit_findings.remediation: Pass AbortSignal into bootstrap() and propagate to each get() call

audit_findings.finding: Android api() function has no timeout/AbortController — any fetch can hang forever blocking UI
audit_findings.remediation: Add AbortController with ~10s timeout matching web/api.js pattern

audit_findings.finding: POST /reminders accepts unbounded 'what' string with no length validation — stored verbatim in SQLite
PA_TOKEN ASCII regex rejects JWT-format tokens containing dots
postMessage with wildcard '*' origin leaks tweak state to any parent frame
audit_findings.remediation: Replace '*' with specific expected parent origin; validate event.origin

audit_findings.finding: WS reconnect backoff caps at 30s but retry counter never resets on transient recovery
audit_findings.remediation: Reset retry on navigator.onchange or add periodic probe; emit status event when retry > 8

audit_findings.finding: Playwright-style tests are actually TestClient API-level tests — naming mismatch with commit message
audit_findings.remediation: Rename to test_api_click_flow.py or clarify in comments

audit_findings.finding: WS token passed as URL query parameter — visible in access logs (unavoidable for browser WS API)
audit_findings.remediation: Document in security notes; consider server-side log scrubbing
